{"jobQuality":85,"redFlags":45,"finalAuditScore":70,"auditImpactScore":85,"summary":"Firework, founded in 2017, is a Series B AI and video commerce company that provides a platform for shoppable videos, live streaming commerce, and monetization capabilities. They focus on humanizing commerce and engagement across the open web, partnering with over 1500 leading brands and retailers globally. The company has raised substantial funding, exceeding $260 million from investors including SoftBank Vision Fund 2, and achieved a $750 million valuation in 2022. Firework reported an annual recurring revenue of $44M in 2024 and currently has an estimated headcount of 350-370 employees. The Director Enterprise Sales role is advertised as remote within the United States, aligning with Firework's hybrid and remote-friendly work environment, although employees near headquarters are encouraged to visit the office. The role requires 30-40% travel for client meetings and industry events. The compensation package includes an estimated base salary range of $110K-$130K, complemented by bonus and stock options. Benefits include company equity, performance bonuses, a home-office stipend for remote employees, flexible paid time off (with a minimum two weeks vacation expectation), and professional development opportunities.\n\n**Red Flags:** The company laid off 10% of its staff in November 2022, which is a notable concern regarding financial stability and employee security, even though it occurred after a significant funding round. While the company promotes a positive culture and offers good benefits, specific employee sentiment from platforms like Glassdoor directly for 'Firework' (the AI commerce company) was not definitively found to provide a detailed view of internal satisfaction beyond generic career platform listings. The base salary range, while stated, could be considered on the lower end for a Director of Enterprise Sales role at a well-funded, high-growth tech company, although the inclusion of unquantified bonus and stock options could significantly increase the overall compensation."}
